title: • Students who prefer structured writing over verbal engagement.
content:
• Students who prefer structured writing over verbal engagement.

📜 Path C: The Rogue Agent Path (Mastery Exam Challenge)

✔ Replaces most traditional coursework with:
• Weekly Mastery Challenge Exams.
• At least one successful “Stump the Professor” challenge.
✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Final Mastery Presentation

🎯 Who This Benefits:
• Highly independent, competitive students who enjoy rigorous intellectual challenges.
• Students who prefer demonstrating mastery in alternative ways.

✅ Why This Works:
• Balances multiple learning styles without diminishing rigor.
• Allows students to self-direct their strengths.
• Maintains clear equity between workload options.

2️⃣ Catharsis, Reflection & Self-Expression Space
